message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame where + mask (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame conditional
selection with fill_value:

- where_with_fill_value: 3-row 2-col frame masked by a same-shape
  bool frame; cells where cond is False get filled with -1.0
- mask_with_fill_value: same shape, inverse semantics — cells where
  cond is True get replaced with -99.0

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.where(cond, other=fill) / frame.mask(cond, other=fill)), runs
the Rust DataFrame.where_cond(cond, fill) / .mask(cond, fill), and
asserts parity via compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameWhere /
DataFrameMask were already wired through the Frame response branch;
this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-jrnn2]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
